data.title: JMMD 6 in 1 Toddler Bike with Push Handle for Kids 18-60 Months, 12" Foldable Balance Bike with Training Wheels, Pedals, Brak

features: GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD: No need to buy multiple kid bikes! This 6-in-1 convertible design easily transforms from a parent-push trike to a toddler tricycle
toddler bike and more — perfectly suited for ages 18 to 60 months. It’s the only bike your child will need through their early years.
ADJUSTABLE STEERING HANDLE FOR SAFE CONTROL: The parent push handle rotates 135° for easy control of the toddler push bike’s speed and direction
helping protect your child from tipping or losing balance. It can also be adjusted to match parents’ height for comfortable guiding. Both the handlebar and seat are height-adjustable
and it comes with a seat extension rod for a perfect fit for kids of different heights.
ALWAYS: Built with parents’ peace of mind in mind. Equipped with an aluminum alloy frame
and 60° steering limiter to prevent sudden turns. The gear-driven
chain-free system keeps your child safe while offering smoother control. Every detail of JMMD kids bicycle is designed for stability
EASY TO ASSEMBLE & FOLD: Arrives 95% pre-assembled — just attach the handlebar
and it’s ready to ride. With one press of the red button under the frame
the toddler bike with training wheels folds instantly
making it easy to carry or store in your car trunk. Setup takes just minutes — no tools
just fun. Perfect for travel and family outings.
THE PERFECT GIFT FOR GROWING KIDS: Designed with training wheels and a kickstand

JMMD 6-in-1 toddler bicycle offers a smooth and safe transition from tricycle to balance bike to real bike. It helps your little one build balance and confidence step by step — from guided rides to independent adventures. A thoughtful gift for birthdays
or first-bike surprises — more than a toy
it’s a memory that grows with your child.

relatedProducts.Title: KRIDDO 2-in-1 Kids Tricycle and Toddler Balance Bike 2 Year Old, Detachable Pedals and Stowable Training Wheels, DIY Plate, R
relatedProducts.Features: VERSATILE 2-IN-1 MODE -This innovative 2-in-1 kids' trike and balance bike meets dual needs with a single bike. Whether in trike mode for stability and safety or balance bike mode for mastering balance skills, your child can learn to ride faster and easier. It saves the hassle of buying two separate bikes and supports your child's growth from beginner to pro. | BUILT-IN PEDAL MOUNT - Easily switch to balance bike mode by storing the pedals in a convenient slot under the rear seat, preventing loss. This innovative design makes it the first balance bike on the market with pedal storage. The pedals can also be fully detached. | STOWABLE TRAINING WHEELS - The training wheels on this bike can be conveniently lifted and stored, providing flexibility as the rider gains confidence. If the training wheels are no longer needed, they can be completely removed, turning it into a classic balance bike. | CUSTOMIZABLE PLATE - Equipped with a customizable plate, allowing kids to DIY their own balance bike style, enhancing their involvement and creativity. | ATTENTION TO DETAIL - KRIDDO focuses on perfecting every detail. The bike features an easy-to-carry soft seat, quick-release fixtures, and tool-free adjustment of the seat and handlebars to achieve the most comfortable height for your child.

Specifications.Special Feature: Adjustable Handlebars, Adjustable Seat, Customizable Plate

features: VERSATILE 2-IN-1 MODE -This innovative 2-in-1 kids' trike and balance bike meets dual needs with a single bike. Whether in trike mode for stability and safety or balance bike mode for mastering balance skills
your child can learn to ride faster and easier. It saves the hassle of buying two separate bikes and supports your child's growth from beginner to pro.
BUILT-IN PEDAL MOUNT - Easily switch to balance bike mode by storing the pedals in a convenient slot under the rear seat
preventing loss. This innovative design makes it the first balance bike on the market with pedal storage. The pedals can also be fully detached.
STOWABLE TRAINING WHEELS - The training wheels on this bike can be conveniently lifted and stored
providing flexibility as the rider gains confidence. If the training wheels are no longer needed
turning it into a classic balance bike.
CUSTOMIZABLE PLATE - Equipped with a customizable plate
allowing kids to DIY their own balance bike style
ATTENTION TO DETAIL - KRIDDO focuses on perfecting every detail. The bike features an easy-to-carry soft seat
and tool-free adjustment of the seat and handlebars to achieve the most comfortable height for your child.
